title: The House of the Seven Gables
author: Nathaniel Hawthorne

setting.note: The gabled house is real, still standing on Turner Street in Salem and now a museum. Hawthorne built the novel around a house he could see, in the town he grew up in and later fled.

rights.originalWork: TODO: confirm. Nathaniel Hawthorne published this in 1851.

rights.attribution: Nathaniel Hawthorne, The House of the Seven Gables (1851).
